title: Add Docker Compose local stack and env templates
verify: Docker Compose config includes PostgreSQL, backend, and storefront services.
Local env templates exist and real .env files are ignored.
Services start locally without production credentials.
evidence_required: docker compose up/ps output showing required services.
Evidence that .env templates are committed and real .env files are ignored.
constraints: No production deploy target is introduced.
Provider settings must use placeholders or mock/local values only.
invariants: No production secrets may be committed.
Do not introduce microservices beyond the local Compose services required by the MVP.
purpose: Provide the Docker Compose path required by REQ-030.
success_outcome: A developer can start PostgreSQL, backend, and storefront locally through Docker Compose using non-secret env templates.
anti_goals: Do not add production deployment configuration.
Do not wire real payment/OAuth/email provider credentials.
Do not replace Medusa Admin with a custom admin.

stop_conditions: Compose setup needs production secrets to start.
Local stack cannot include all required services.
Implementation requires adding an external managed service.
